message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with dependency changes

Refresh lockfile to capture transitive dependency updates from
recent cargo operations. 11 packages updated to newer versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1052,7 +1052,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "sqlmodel"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "serde",
@@ -1067,7 +1067,7 @@ dependencies = [
